# Dan Edwards — Terminal Portfolio

> A portfolio website for Dan Edwards, a Senior Software Engineer at Infinite Red. The site is presented as an interactive terminal interface where visitors type commands to navigate sections. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, React, and Tailwind CSS.

Dan Edwards is a Web & Mobile Developer with over 9 years of experience, specializing in React Native, TypeScript, and AI. He currently works at Infinite Red building design systems, component libraries, and mobile apps for Fortune 5 companies. Previously he worked at Wise Technologies, Orange Bees, and NewSpring Church. He holds a B.S. in Finance from Anderson University and studied Front End Web Development at The Iron Yard.

The site supports terminal commands: type `about`, `projects`, `skills`, `resume`, `contact`, `help`, `theme`, `surprise`, `download`, `game`, and more. Easter egg commands include `matrix`, `cowsay`, `neofetch`, `sudo`, and `whoami`. Use Tab to autocomplete and arrow keys to navigate command history. The site also responds to URL query parameters (e.g., `?cmd=about`).

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/cdanwards): Dan's GitHub profile and open source work
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cdanwards/): Professional profile and networking
- [BlueSky](https://bsky.app/profile/cdanwards.bsky.social): Social media presence
- [Email](mailto:cdaniel.edwards@gmail.com): Direct contact

## Projects

- [Terminal Portfolio Website](https://github.com/cdanwards/terminal-site): This site — a portfolio presented as an interactive terminal interface, built with Next.js, TypeScript, React, and Tailwind CSS
- [Psychosocial](https://github.com/cdanwards/psychosocial): A parody social media platform with a metal-inspired interface, built with React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB
- [Animation Practice](https://github.com/cdanwards/animation-practice): React Native animation experiments using the Animation API with TypeScript and Expo
- [Codeword](https://github.com/cdanwards/Codeword): A multiplayer word game built with React Native, Expo, Supabase, Zustand, and Expo Router

## Skills

- Frontend: React.js, React Native, Expo, Next.js, TypeScript, GraphQL, Apollo, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI
- State Management: Redux, MST, Zustand, React Context
- Testing: Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress, Playwright, Detox, Maestro, Storybook
- DevOps & Scaling: EAS, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Monorepos (Yarn Workspaces, Changesets)
- Collaboration & Leadership: Agile, Design Sprints, Stakeholder Communication, Mentorship, Accessibility & Performance Improvements
